deviations.description: The process model enforces that anesthesia is applied immediately after patient preparation, as shown by the direct sequence from 'Prepare Patient' to 'Administer Anaesthesia' in the diagram on page 1. Version 2 relaxes this requirement, allowing anesthesia to be applied at any point after preparation. The process unnecessarily restricts behavior by not permitting any delay or intervening activities between preparation and anesthesia.
